case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES VS. REDWOOD CITY CABINETS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-07-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT REDWOOD CITY CABINETS, INC. $61,910.45 PRINCIPAL, $1,775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $710.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $64,395.45, SEE SCANNED DOC

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR # 5963

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities IS GRANTED.
